currently_doing: Preparing the next implementation step: a minimal tf_keras quantized gating surrogate built from Akida-supported primitives.

major_milestones.name: Workspace and measurement harness
major_milestones.summary: Prototype workspace, baseline scripts, artifacts, and dashboard are in place.

major_milestones.name: Sparse surrogate discovery
major_milestones.summary: Threshold-gated surrogate exceeded target in software with 7.53x proxy gain and 0.266% relative MSE.

major_milestones.name: Alternative mechanism comparison
major_milestones.summary: Top-k, spike-proxy, Lava feasibility, Meta-TF feasibility, and prior-art scan are done.

major_milestones.name: Akida-friendly surrogate design
major_milestones.summary: Need to express the winning behavior using supported tf_keras / Akida-compatible primitives.

major_milestones.name: Quantization and conversion validation
major_milestones.summary: Run compatibility, quantization, and conversion checks on the surrogate.

major_milestones.name: Hardware purchase readiness decision
major_milestones.summary: Decide on chip purchase only after the surrogate survives the real toolchain path.

pending_tasks: Implement minimal tf_keras quantized gating surrogate
Check cnn2snn compatibility on the surrogate
Validate threshold 0.20 behavior on a slightly larger setup
Compare against adaptive top-k or Q-K style sparse alternative

completed_subagent_wave.name: threshold-sweep-1
completed_subagent_wave.summary: Confirmed threshold 0.20 as a strong reproducible operating point.

completed_subagent_wave.name: threshold-sweep-2
completed_subagent_wave.summary: Confirmed the same threshold frontier and quality-efficiency plateau.

completed_subagent_wave.name: topk-gating
completed_subagent_wave.summary: Top-k improved fidelity but missed the 5x efficiency target at fixed k=2.

completed_subagent_wave.name: spike-proxy
completed_subagent_wave.summary: Event-driven row refresh stayed under 1% loss but only reached about 2.67x gain.

completed_subagent_wave.name: metatf-feasibility
completed_subagent_wave.summary: Direct MHA conversion looks blocked; Akida-friendly surrogate path is preferred.

completed_subagent_wave.name: lava-feasibility
completed_subagent_wave.summary: Conceptually plausible but Lava is not installed locally.
